prompt: Create branding for an artisanal pottery studio with the handcrafted ceramic bowl.
prompt_refined: Generate a brand identity visual for an artisanal pottery studio. The image should centrally feature the handcrafted ceramic bowl from image 1. Integrate a brand logo and studio name typography (textual graphics) around the bowl, harmonizing with its distinct terracotta base, teal interior, and intricate, organic textural patterns. The overall composition should evoke a unique, handcrafted, and earthy aesthetic suitable for artisanal ceramics.
objects: handcrafted ceramic bowl (from image 1, centrally featured)
studio name typography (textual graphics, around the bowl)
